query:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(max_updated), '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz) as "max_updated!"
                   FROM (
                       SELECT MAX(gl.updated_at) as max_updated FROM grocery_lists gl LEFT JOIN grocery_list_members glm ON gl.id = glm."listId" AND glm.is_deleted = FALSE AND glm."userId" = $1 WHERE (gl."ownerId" = $1 OR glm.id IS NOT NULL)
                       UNION ALL
                       SELECT MAX(glm.updated_at) as max_updated FROM grocery_list_members glm JOIN grocery_list_members my_glm ON glm."listId" = my_glm."listId" AND my_glm.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE my_glm."userId" = $1
                       UNION ALL
                       SELECT MAX(s.updated_at) as max_updated FROM stores s LEFT JOIN grocery_list_members glm ON s."listId" = glm."listId" AND glm."userId" = $1 AND glm.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE (s."userId" = $1 OR glm.id IS NOT NULL)
                       UNION ALL
                       SELECT MAX(c.updated_at) as max_updated FROM categories c LEFT JOIN grocery_list_members glm ON c."listId" = glm."listId" AND glm."userId" = $1 AND glm.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE (c."userId" = $1 OR glm.id IS NOT NULL)
                       UNION ALL
                       SELECT MAX(gi.updated_at) as max_updated FROM grocery_items gi LEFT JOIN grocery_list_members glm ON gi."listId" = glm."listId" AND glm."userId" = $1 AND glm.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE (glm.id IS NOT NULL OR (gi."listId" IS NULL AND gi."userId" = $1))
                       UNION ALL
                       SELECT MAX(gsi.updated_at) as max_updated FROM grocery_item_store_info gsi JOIN stores s ON gsi."storeId" = s.id LEFT JOIN grocery_list_members glm ON s."listId" = glm."listId" AND glm."userId" = $1 AND glm.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE (s."userId" = $1 OR glm.id IS NOT NULL)
                   ) subquery
